title: Hoplite Modpack
description: Modpack for Hoplite that adds bunch of cool mods to boost the experience!
body:
![https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcmsassets.lunarclientcdn.com%2Fcdn-cgi%2Fimage%2Fquality%3D85%2Cformat%3Dauto%2Fassets%2Fbb4999e152-hoplite-modpack.png&n=-1](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcmsassets.lunarclientcdn.com%2Fcdn-cgi%2Fimage%2Fquality%3D85%2Cformat%3Dauto%2Fassets%2Fbb4999e152-hoplite-modpack.png&n=-1) ## тЪФя╕П Hoplite Installer Modpack The **Hoplite Installer Modpack** is the official client pack made for the **Hoplite Network**, built for **Minecraft 1.21**. ItтАЩs a lightweight setup focused on smooth performance, clean visuals, and in-game **proximity voice chat**. Everything is preconfigured so you can just install and play. This pack uses proven optimization mods like **Sodium**, **Lithium**, and **Krypton**, along with helpful UI and utility tweaks. ItтАЩs made to feel fast and responsive while keeping the game close to vanilla in style. This modpack will AUTOMATICLY add hoplite.gg into your servers list! **Disclaimer! This project is not official and is not affiliated with or endorsed by the creators of Hoplite.** --- ### тЬи Main Features - тЪб Performance upgrades with Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, and Krypton - ЁЯОЩя╕П Built-in proximity voice chat with Simple Voice Chat - ЁЯМИ Shader support through Iris - ЁЯОо Small but useful interface improvements - ЁЯзй Config libraries for easy customization - ЁЯТм Discord presence integration - ЁЯк╢ Lightweight and stable for both singleplayer and servers ---
ЁЯзй Included Mods - **Lithium** `mc1.21-0.12.7` - **Status Effect Bars** `1.0.6` - **FerriteCore** `7.0.0-fabric` - **Krypton** `0.2.8` - **Iris Shaders** `1.7.3+1.21` - **Scoreboard Tweaks** `1.0.0` - **BoxLib** `14.2.2-Boxlib` - **Mod Menu** `11.0.1` - **Simple Discord RPC** `3.3.2` - **Full Brightness Toggle** `1.21.0-4.1-fabric+forge+neo` - **Fabric API** `0.100.7+1.21` - **CraterLib** `1.21-2.0.1` - **AppleSkin** `3.0.2+mc1.21` - **Cloth Config API** `15.0.128+fabric` - **Ping in Tablist** `1.0.1` - **Simple Armor HUD** `1.4.5-1.21` - **Collective** `1.21.0-7.73-fabric+forge+neo` - **Simple Voice Chat** `fabric-1.21.1-2.5.20` - **WI Zoom** `1.5-MC1.21` - **Concentration** `1.1.3` - **YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)** `3.5.0+1.21-fabric` - **Coordinates Display** `13.0.0-fabric` - **Sodium** `mc1.21-0.5.11`
--- ### ЁЯза Why use this pack? The Hoplite Installer Modpack is built to give you a smooth and reliable experience without clutter. ItтАЩs fast, clean, and easy to use, making it perfect for multiplayer sessions or casual play. тнР Simple setup. Smooth gameplay. Hoplite quality.
